import{o as e,t}from"./react-16zIsxtG.js";import{l as n}from"./constants-BBvE2jS0.js";var r=e(t()),i=n?(e,t)=>{console.groupCollapsed(`%c[useIntersectionObserver] 👀 DO NOT IGNORE 👀 (Render #${t}) If you see this log spam the console, expand to investigate why...`,`font-weight: bold;`),console.log(`useIntersectionObserver params should be memoized to avoid unnecessary observer re-creation.`),console.log(`Check the following stack trace to see where you may need to add some memoization (eg. useCallback, useMemo):`),console.log(e),console.groupEnd()}:null,a=(e,t,a)=>{let o=n?Error().stack:``,s=(0,r.useRef)(0);(0,r.useEffect)(()=>{if(e&&n){let e=setInterval(()=>{s.current=0},2e3);return()=>clearInterval(e)}},[e]),(0,r.useEffect)(()=>{if(!e)return;s.current++>=10&&i?.(o,s.current);let n=typeof a==`function`?a():a,r=new IntersectionObserver(t,n);if(Array.isArray(e.current))e.current.forEach(e=>{r.observe(e)});else if(e.current){let t=e.current;r.observe(t)}return()=>r.disconnect()},[t,a,e,o])};export{a as t};
//# sourceMappingURL=useIntersectionObserver-CXzVVTrD.js.map
